title: CeraLive Image Family Manifest
description: Family-tier manifest. Captures the SoC/architecture-level build attributes shared by every board in a family (e.g. rk3588). A single family file is referenced by many board files via the board manifest's `family` field. Only fields actually consumed by the v2 builder are modelled; descriptive hardware metadata from the legacy configs/devices/*.conf lives in the board `description`/`quirks`, not here.

arch.description: Target CPU architecture in mkosi's identifier space (consumed by mkosi --architecture; see lib/orchestrate.sh). 'arm64' covers rk3588; 'x86-64' covers Intel N100/N200 + AMD mini-PCs. mkosi has NO 'amd64' — its x86 identifier is 'x86-64' (learnings task 13). 'amd64' is retained only as a legacy alias that orchestrate.sh maps to mkosi x86-64; NEW x86 families use 'x86-64' directly. NOTE: the Debian *package* arch is still 'amd64' (e.g. linux-image-amd64) — that lives in kernel_packages, never here.

armbian_branch.description: Armbian kernel/U-Boot branch passed as BRANCH= to compile.sh (userpatches/config-*.conf BRANCH=). rk3588 builds on 'vendor' for HDMI hdmirx + mature MPP HW-encode (decision D3). NOTE: ARMBIAN_BRANCH=current in legacy configs/devices/*.conf is dead metadata; the effective branch is this field. x86 families set 'none': they do not use the Armbian BSP at all (Debian generic kernel + GRUB/EFI; there is no Armbian compile.sh BRANCH for x86).

kernel_packages.description: Armbian kernel image package(s) for the family (e.g. linux-image-vendor-rockchip64). Maps to the linux-image-* entries of BOARD_PACKAGES.

uboot_packages.description: Bootloader / U-Boot blob package(s) (e.g. rkbin-rk3588). Maps to BOOTLOADER/rkbin entries. May be empty for families whose U-Boot is supplied raw outside apt.

dtb_packages.description: Device-tree blob package(s) (e.g. linux-dtb-vendor-rockchip64). Maps to the linux-dtb-* entries of BOARD_PACKAGES. EMPTY ([]) on x86 families: x86-64 platforms enumerate hardware via ACPI and ship no device tree, so they declare no DTB package. Still REQUIRED to be present (as []) so the absence is explicit, not accidental.

firmware_packages.description: SoC/GPU/Wi-Fi firmware package(s) (e.g. armbian-firmware, mali-g610-firmware, firmware-realtek). Maps to firmware entries of BOARD_PACKAGES / EXTRA_BSP_PACKAGES and FIRMWARE_FILES blobs.

rauc_bootloader_adapter.description: RAUC bootloader backend for A/B slot selection. rk3588 defaults to 'custom' because vendor U-Boot 2017.09 lacks fw_setenv (decision D3). 'uboot' = standard fw_setenv adapter; 'custom' = raw GPT bootcount approach; 'efi'/'grub' = x86 targets.

hw_accel_gstreamer_plugins.description: Hardware-accelerated GStreamer encode/decode plugin packages for the family (e.g. rk3588 MPP plugins). Optional: software-only families (generic x264) omit this. Maps to VIDEO_ENCODER/VIDEO_DECODER hardware path.

partition_template.description: Name of the frozen partition layout template defined in docs/partition-contract.md (e.g. 'rk3588-ab'). Reference by NAME only — partition sizes, slot roles and the single-slot threshold live in the FROZEN contract document, never in this schema.

serial_console.description: Armbian SERIALCON value as '<tty>:<baud>' (e.g. 'ttyS2:1500000'). Maps to userpatches/config-*.conf SERIALCON and the CONSOLE= line.

gstreamer_runtime_packages.description: Runtime GStreamer multimedia support packages for the family (e.g. rockchip-multimedia-config). Optional. Maps to the multimedia-config entries of BOARD_PACKAGES / EXTRA_BSP_PACKAGES.
